'''Si''' was a [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] exile and a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] within the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. He was based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]] which was home to the [[Brrbrlpp]]. During his off-duty hours at the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] base, he studied the Brrbrlpp and studied their language and culture. He also taught the natives how to speak [[Trinary]] since their tongue was difficult for offworlders to understand.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' {{1stm}}
